creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
This is the upgrade for Qt 1.42 -> 1.45. In this,
I assume maintainership with Andreas Klemm's approval.
Later, (after the freeze probably) I'll be upgrading
this to USE_NEWGCC. For now, it's probably a good thing
if we have the latest Qt in the ports tree for -RELEASE.

A patch for bsd.port.mk (very trivial) is attached as
well. This PR requires the cooperation of Asami-san and
another committer. Of course, if Satoshi feels daring
enough, he could do the whole job himself. :-))

I decided to keep the original "created by" in comments.

X--- configs/freebsd-g++-shared	Fri Feb 26 12:01:59 1999
X+++ configs/freebsd-g++-shared.new	Sun Jan  2 17:11:37 2000
X@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@
X 
X # Linking applications
X SYSCONF_LINK		= g++
X-SYSCONF_LFLAGS		= 
X+SYSCONF_LFLAGS		= %%CXXFLAGS%%
X SYSCONF_LIBS		= 
X 
X # Link flags shared objects
X@@ -40,15 +40,13 @@
X #   - Usually needs to incorporate $(VER_MAJ) and $(VER_MIN)
X #
X SYSCONF_LINK_SHLIB	= g++
X-SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_SHARED	= lib$(TARGET).so.$(VER_MAJ).$(VER_MIN)
X-SYSCONF_LINK_LIB_SHARED	=  $(SYSCONF_LINK_SHLIB) -shared  \
X+SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_SHARED	= lib$(TARGET).so.3
X+SYSCONF_LINK_LIB_SHARED	=  $(SYSCONF_LINK_SHLIB) -shared %%CXXFLAGS%% \
X 				     $(LFLAGS) -o $(SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_SHARED) \
X 				     $(OBJECTS) $(OBJMOC) $(LIBS); \
X 				 mv $(SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_SHARED) $(DESTDIR); \
X 				 cd $(DESTDIR); \
X-				 rm -f lib$(TARGET).so lib$(TARGET).so.$(VER_MAJ); \
X-				 ln -s $(SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_SHARED) lib$(TARGET).so; \
X-				 ln -s $(SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_SHARED) lib$(TARGET).so.$(VER_MAJ)
X+				 ln -s $(SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_SHARED) lib$(TARGET).so
X 
X # Linking static libraries
X #   - Build the $(TARGET) library, eg. lib$(TARGET).a
X@@ -59,11 +57,11 @@
X SYSCONF_LINK_LIB_STATIC	= rm -f $(DESTDIR)$(SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_STATIC) ; \
X 				 $(SYSCONF_AR) $(DESTDIR)$(SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_STATIC) $(OBJECTS) $(OBJMOC) 
X # Compiling application source
X-SYSCONF_CXXFLAGS	= -pipe -O2 -fno-strength-reduce
X+SYSCONF_CXXFLAGS	= %%CXXFLAGS%% -fno-strength-reduce
X # Compiling library source
X-SYSCONF_CXXFLAGS_LIB	= -O2 -fno-strength-reduce -fPIC
X+SYSCONF_CXXFLAGS_LIB	= %%CXXFLAGS%% -fno-strength-reduce -fPIC
X # Compiling shared-object source
X-SYSCONF_CXXFLAGS_SHOBJ	= -O2 -fno-strength-reduce -fPIC
X+SYSCONF_CXXFLAGS_SHOBJ	= %%CXXFLAGS%% -fno-strength-reduce -fPIC
X # Default link type (stati linking is still be used where required)
X SYSCONF_LINK_LIB	= $(SYSCONF_LINK_LIB_SHARED)
X SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET	= $(SYSCONF_LINK_TARGET_SHARED)
END-of-qt145/patches/patch-aa
